message:
fix(vdbe): update DELETE codegen tests for two-pass pattern + fix SELECT index register allocation + 20 probe tests

- Update 3 DELETE codegen unit tests to expect two-pass RowSet pattern (Rewind/RowSetAdd/RowSetRead/SeekRowid)
  instead of old one-pass reverse scan (Last/Prev)
- Fix SELECT-with-index codegen: allocate param_reg and min_rowid_reg as contiguous pair via alloc_regs(2)
  so MakeRecord correctly consumes [param, min_rowid] (was broken by intervening saw_index_match_reg allocation)
- Add 20 new conformance oracle probe tests (s500-s519): nested CTEs, multi-column IN, INSERT/DELETE/UPDATE
  variants, NULLIF/COALESCE/IIF, GROUP_CONCAT, REPLACE, typeof/total, AUTOINCREMENT, CASE+aggregate,
  INSERT OR IGNORE/REPLACE, subquery in ORDER BY, complex UPDATE, self-join + recursive CTE,
  multi-table DELETE, UNION/INTERSECT/EXCEPT, complex HAVING, date functions, window LAG/LEAD/NTILE
- Mark known limitations as #[ignore]: expression indexes, type affinity in connection-level evaluator,
  multi-column IN tuple syntax

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
